recommendations.recommendation: Carbohydrate loading: 8-12g/kg body weight of complex carbs daily
recommendations.rationale: Maximizes hepatic and muscular glycogen stores for sustained mental energy

recommendations.recommendation: Dinner rich in complex carbs (pasta, rice, sweet potatoes) with lean protein
recommendations.rationale: Ensures glycogen saturation by morning without digestive discomfort

recommendations.recommendation: Oats, eggs, spinach, nuts — slow-release energy with neurotransmitter precursors
recommendations.rationale: Provides sustained glucose release and precursors for dopamine/acetylcholine synthesis

recommendations.recommendation: Light meal: grilled chicken with rice or fish with vegetables
recommendations.rationale: Avoid blood flow hijacking to digestive system during critical thinking

recommendations.recommendation: Nuts, dates, dark chocolate (>70%), banana. Small portions every 45-60 min
recommendations.rationale: Micro-feeding prevents glucose fluctuations and maintains steady brain fuel

recommendations.recommendation: Water with electrolytes (sodium, potassium). Avoid pure water in excess
recommendations.rationale: Prevents hyponatremia and maintains neural signal transmission speed

recommendations.recommendation: Protein + carb recovery shake (3:1 ratio) within 30 minutes
recommendations.rationale: Replenishes depleted neurotransmitters and repairs tissue stress from sustained cortisol

recommendations.recommendation: Light breakfast, 20-minute walk, no intensive study
recommendations.rationale: Active recovery promotes blood flow without adding cognitive load

recommendations.recommendation: Review previous game briefly, then disconnect from chess
recommendations.rationale: Prevents analysis paralysis and allows subconscious pattern consolidation

recommendations.recommendation: Balanced meals with emphasis on anti-inflammatory foods (berries, fatty fish, leafy greens)
recommendations.rationale: Reduces neuroinflammation from sustained cognitive effort

recommendations.recommendation: No screens 90 minutes before bed. Chamomile tea or tart cherry juice
recommendations.rationale: Maximizes REM sleep for pattern consolidation learned during training
